question: Will Alex Honnold successfully free solo Taipei 101 on January 23, 2026?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves YES if Alex Honnold successfully ascends Taipei 101 on a continuous free solo climb that begins on 23 January 2026 PT.

[image]https://x.com/AlexHonnold/status/2002807370452509170

Update 2025-12-23 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): If the climb is rescheduled due to weather or other reasons, the market resolves NO. The event must occur on January 23, 2026 specifically.

Update 2025-12-23 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): The climb must begin on January 23, 2026 PT (Pacific Time). If delayed by a few hours but still starts on the 23rd PT, the market remains valid.
